subcodes.first_line: The mention of thy remembrance hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One, and there hath been revealed for thee that which beareth witness to His grace and loving-kindness, which have preceded all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم و انزل لک ما شهد بفضله و عنایته التی سبقت کل الاشیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @station of the Manifestation of God
